hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs reduce repeated manual reviews by unifying fragmented provider outputs into a structured, audit-ready compliance workflow with connected decisions and evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams repeatedly perform the same checks across disconnected provider outputs, creating inefficiencies and slowing onboarding. This fragmentation leads to inconsistent decisions, weak audit trails, and higher operational risk for VASPs handling complex digital asset workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, review actions, case workflows and audit evidence into a unified system that reduces duplicated manual reviews and streamlines compliance operations for VASPs.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, applies rules and risk reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence to reduce duplicated manual reviews.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond duplicated reviews. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY reduces repeated manual reviews by connecting fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence for clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves decision consistency across cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce repeated manual reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, reducing duplicated reviews by consolidating identity, wallet, transaction and case data into one operational compliance layer for faster decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening results into connected cases and workflows, enabling teams to triage alerts and manage reviews without switching between siloed tools.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and evidence packages, maintaining an audit trail that supports consistent compliance review and easier regulatory or bank due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers and compliance tools, orchestrating their outputs within a controlled environment with role-based access, audit logging and configurable policies.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured compliance reviews, cases, evidence and reports to reduce manual work and improve audit readiness.
final_title: Reduce repeated manual reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into connected workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance.
